name: Humanoid
short_description: Embark on a heart-pounding journey in this survival open-world game, where a relentless creature, Humanoids prowls the landscape. Explore, craft, build, and fight for your life as you navigate the dangerous world.
detailed_description:
Embark on a heart-pounding journey in this survival open-world game, where a relentless creature, Humanoids prowls the landscape. Explore, craft, build, and fight for your life as you navigate the dangerous world.

Explore Unknown World
Join on an enchanting adventure through a captivating, open-world with stunning land and underwater creatures. Unearth hidden secrets, discover new plants, and collect invaluable items as you immerse yourself in the beauty of this expansive realm.


Craft & Build
Unleash your creativity with a vast array of buildable and craftable items, from humble shelters to mythic castles. with a high levels of possibilities, channel your inner architect as you design and construct your own structures, allowing you to shape the landscape to your dreams. Let your Imagination soar as you craft and build, turning this world into what you desire.


Survive
In this world survival is paramount. Navigate the dangerous terrain, evading relentless Humanoids, giant insects and any other possible threats. With hunger gnawing at your core, scavenge for food to sustain yourself, while ensuring your safety remains the top priority.


Features:
  • High level freedom in building, from small shelters to great castles. and also there are few decoratives that makes building more fun.
  • Use customization system to have the character you want to survive with.
  • A huge amount of weapons, armors and items to have best surviving experience.
  • Day-night cycle and weather system which changes with different seasons and biomes.
  • You can tame a creature to help you explore faster and safer.
  • Engaging fight experience with heavy weapons, bows, shields and all other goods with their different type of fighting.

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Persian
